reasoning: The question asks for the probability that the daily average temperature at Reims-Prunay Aerodrome will be higher on a future unspecified resolution date (inferred as the single close date of 2026-02-07) than on 2025-11-09. Early November in Reims typically averages a daily mean temperature of around 7.5°C with a standard deviation of ~4°C. Early February averages around 3.5°C with a standard deviation of ~4.5°C. The difference between randomly selected days in these periods has a mean of approximately -4°C and a standard deviation of roughly 6°C. Assuming a roughly normal distribution for the difference, P(Feb 7 > Nov 9) = P(Z > 4/6) = P(Z > 0.67) ≈ 0.25. Recent temperature observations (e.g., Oct 30) do not strongly constrain this due to the 10-day gap to Nov 9.
